rules.rationale: A previously unseen asset entered the preserved scope evidence.
rules.title: Asset first observed

rules.rationale: A previously missing or removed asset returned.
rules.title: Asset reappeared

rules.rationale: A stable asset crossed the accepted absence threshold.
rules.title: Stable asset removed

rules.rationale: The evidence-backed device classification changed between preserved scans.
rules.title: Device classification changed

rules.rationale: Identity coverage changed materially and established a new baseline.
rules.title: Identity baseline reset

rules.rationale: A monitored service present in the baseline is absent from complete current evidence.
rules.title: Monitored service closed

rules.rationale: A monitored service is present in current evidence but absent from the baseline.
rules.title: Monitored service opened

rules.rationale: NetSniper supplied a new interpreted finding for the scoped asset.
rules.title: Finding added

rules.rationale: A prior finding is absent from complete current evidence.
rules.title: Finding removed

rules.rationale: The telemetry contract changed and established a new comparison baseline.
rules.title: Profile baseline reset

rules.rationale: The scan profile differs from its comparison baseline.
rules.title: Telemetry profile changed

rules.rationale: Telemetry quality evidence requires operator review.
rules.title: Telemetry review required
